R : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : DecidableEq R
inst✝ : DivisionRing R
h : Fintype R
Z : Subring R := center R
n : ℕ
H : ∃ x y, x ≠ y
h_n : n ≠ 0
q : ℕ := Fintype.card ↥Z
h_card : Fintype.card R = q ^ n
finclassa : (A : ConjClasses Rˣ) → Fintype ↑A.carrier
this✝² : (A : ConjClasses Rˣ) → Fintype ↑{Quotient.out A}.centralizer
fintypea : ConjClasses Rˣ →
  Fintype
    ↑{A |
        have this := finclassa A;
        Fintype.card ↑A.carrier > 1} :=
  fun A =>
    setFintype
      {A |
        have this := finclassa A;
        Fintype.card ↑A.carrier > 1}
this✝¹ :
  Fintype
    ↑{A |
        have this := finclassa A;
        Fintype.card ↑A.carrier > 1}
S' : Set (ConjClasses Rˣ) := ConjClasses.noncenter Rˣ
this✝ : Fintype ↑S'
S : Finset (ConjClasses Rˣ) := S'.toFinset
n_k : ↑S' → ℕ := sorry
h_R : Fintype.card Rˣ = q ^ n - 1
h_Z : Fintype.card (↥Z)ˣ = q - 1
H1 : q ^ n - 1 = q - 1 + ∑ x ∈ (ConjClasses.noncenter Rˣ).toFinset, x.carrier.toFinset.card
e : ↥(Subgroup.center Rˣ) ≃* (↥(Submonoid.center R))ˣ := Subgroup.centerUnitsEquivUnitsCenter R
f : (↥(Submonoid.center R))ˣ ≃ (↥Z)ˣ := Equiv.inv (↥(Submonoid.center R))ˣ
this : ∀ (A : ↑S'), Fintype.card ↑(↑A).carrier * (q ^ n_k A - 1) = q ^ n - 1
h1 : q ^ n - 1 = q - 1 + ∑ A, (q ^ n - 1) / (q ^ n_k A - 1)
hZ : Nonempty ↥Z
hq_pow_pos : ∀ (m : ℕ), 1 ≤ q ^ m
h_n_k_A_dvd : ∀ (A : ↑S'), n_k A ∣ n
hq : q = Fintype.card ↥(center R)
h₁_dvd : eval (↑q) (phi n) ∣ eval (↑q) (X ^ n - 1)
A : ↑S'
hs : A ∈ univ
⊢ 1 ≠ n_k A

intro h_one
  have h_centralizer_card : q ^ n_k A - 1 = q - 1 := by
    rw [h_one]
  have h_orbit_card : Fintype.card ↑(↑A).carrier = (q ^ n - 1) / (q - 1) := by
    rw [← this A, h_centralizer_card]
  have h_noncenter : Fintype.card ↑(↑A).carrier > 1 := by
    exact ConjClasses.noncenter_spec A
  have h_q_gt_1 : q > 1 := by
    have hZ' : Fintype.card Z ≥ 2 := by
      rcases H with ⟨x, y, hxy⟩
      have hx : x ∈ Z ∨ x ∉ Z := by apply Classical.em
      have hy : y ∈ Z ∨ y ∉ Z := by apply Classical.em
      cases' hx with hx hx <;> cases' hy with hy hy <;> try { contradiction }
      · exact Fintype.card_pos
      · exact Fintype.card_pos
      · exact Fintype.card_pos
      · exact Fintype.card_pos
    linarith
  have h_denom_pos : 0 < q - 1 := by
    omega
  have h_num_ge_denom : q ^ n - 1 ≥ q - 1 := by
    have h_pow_ge : q ^ n ≥ q := by
      exact Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by linarith) (by omega)
    omega
  have h_orbit_eq_one : Fintype.card ↑(↑A).carrier = 1 := by
    rw [h_orbit_card]
    have h_div : (q ^ n - 1) / (q - 1) = 1 := by
      apply Nat.div_eq_of_eq_mul_left h_denom_pos
      omega
    exact h_div
  linarith
